title: LIVE: Sakana VS Claude Fable 5 VS Fusion!
summary: Julian Goldie tests and compares the Sakana model against Claude Fable 5 and Fusion in a live stream. The session focuses on practical AI applications built with an Agent OS framework for SEO and business automation.
writeup: A live stream from Julian Goldie SEO that tests and compares three AI models, Sakana, Claude Fable 5, and Fusion. The session runs them through practical applications built on an Agent OS framework aimed at SEO and business automation. The focus is hands-on model evaluation and AI agents rather than benchmarks in the abstract.
